Title: The Three Musketeers - Part I: D'Artagnan
Writer: Matthieu Delaporte, Alexandre de La Patellière, Alexandre Dumas
Actors: François Civil, Vincent Cassel, Romain Duris
Plot: Young D'Artagnan joins the King's three musketeers as they work to ensure the future of France.
Language: French, English, Italian, Spanish, German, Latin
